title: Vanilla Cookbook
description: Adds food in a vanilla friendly way.
body:
Welcome to:
![Text stylized like the Minecraft title reading "Vanilla Cookbook"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55d9b273d074bc784516c6a209f4f899f8d3ae57.png)

Minecraft has a lot of potential with the ingredients already in the game. However, it doesn't seem like they're interested in using that potential, since they barely add any new food items. I decided to take things into my own hands and make a mod that shows what Minecraft could or should do with their food. Over 80 new dishes, 8 new cakes, a placeable pancake stack, and a placeable brownie tray.

Milk Bottles, Cheese, Stuffed Seapickles, and Cheesecake all clear potion effects like milk does.

There's also some new loot, villager trades, and a bunch of items can be thrown into the composter if you want.

More info on all of this can be found on the mod's Curseforge page.

Adds cake slices and cooking pot recipes if Farmer's Delight is also used. Thanks to vectorwing for letting me use his Cake Slice texture as a base for my own cake slice textures. Also includes other miscellaneous mod compatibility.

A list of all the mod's recipes can be found [Here](https://github.com/Moralle/VanillaCookbook/wiki)!
